mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project_info ( project_name, description, budget, balance, status, leader_id, del_flag, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{projectName}, #{description}, #{budget}, #{balance}, #{status}, #{leaderId}, 0, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM project_info WHERE id = #{id} AND del_flag = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE project_info SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND del_flag = 0
